title: Tolvi decision frontmatter
description: Frontmatter schema for files in vault/decisions/.

tags.description: Tags describing the doc. The first tag SHOULD be 'decision'. Case-sensitive; no duplicates.

date.description: ISO-8601 date matching the filename date prefix.

repo.description: The repo this decision binds to (slug).

ticket.description: Optional. Free-form issue tracker reference, URL, or 'none'.

supersedes.description: Optional. Slug of an older decision this one replaces.

superseded_by.description: Optional. Slug of a newer decision that replaces this one. Required when status is 'superseded'.
